data.body: S2 TDD RED confirmed: happy-path suite (config parse, StaticBearerVerifier accept/reject, composite matching-resource accept, http valid-token-200/no-token-401) + held-out suite (PRM single-AS, scope 403, wrong/None-resource composite reject, composite contract none/accept/raise/shortcircuit, fail-closed startup x3, digest-only storage, plaintext-literal + missing-fields reject, token_env ref, redaction-on-raise, session-id replay 401). Both RED (McpConfig lacks auth fields, rebar._mcp_auth absent). Dispatching held-out implementer.
